_note: Broken oRTB 3.0 BidRequest — envelope present but required fields are missing or wrong: openrtb.ver is empty, openrtb.request.id is missing, item[0].id is missing, item[0].spec is missing, no context. Validator should emit ~5 ERRORs + 1 WARN + the deep_validation_limited INFO note. Useful to demonstrate every per-item rule firing in one paste.
